intro: You are the bear. Shoot, skate, and race through outrageous challenges in this action‑adventure with bite.
description:
You are a bear on a mission to take down the careless international delivery corporation, Forest Inc, that are destroying the planet and left your friend in a wheelchair. This action-packed game features multiple locations, each with its own unique gameplay mechanics and challenges. Use your wits and quick reflexes to defeat enemies and bosses, while also navigating challenging environments on skateboards, hovercrafts and paws. Set across 12 different levels you will pursue the evil CEO, Taking down hench men and a variety of baddies and leaving destruction in your path.

key Features
Pretty OK Gun Play
- Master your gun as you make your way through the game taking down many bad guys and vending machines. 
Explore 12 sort-of good levels
- Each level contains easter eggs and thingys for you to have fun with. Making each map feel new and fun.
Loads of passable gameplay variety
- Skateboard, Kart, sidescroll, top down racing, hovercrafts and skating. There's loads to do.
So what are you waiting for. Grab it now. Its pawesome.
